scripts.build: SDK=$(xcrun --sdk iphoneos --show-sdk-path) && mkdir -p ios_ng/Norn/.swift-module-cache && xcrun swiftc -typecheck -sdk "$SDK" -target arm64-apple-ios26.2 -module-cache-path ios_ng/Norn/.swift-module-cache $(find ios_ng/Norn/Norn -name '*.swift' -print | sort)
scripts.lint: SDK=$(xcrun --sdk iphoneos --show-sdk-path) && mkdir -p ios_ng/Norn/.swift-module-cache && xcrun swiftc -typecheck -sdk "$SDK" -target arm64-apple-ios26.2 -module-cache-path ios_ng/Norn/.swift-module-cache $(find ios_ng/Norn/Norn -name '*.swift' -print | sort)
scripts.xcode:build: xcodebuild -project ios_ng/Norn/Norn.xcodeproj -scheme Norn -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -derivedDataPath ios_ng/Norn/build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
